skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem: The system of equations above has solution (x, y), where x > 0. What is the value of x?
rationale: Setting 6x = x2 − 16 gives x2 − 6x − 16 = 0. Factoring: (x − 8)(x + 2) = 0, so x = 8 or x = −2. Since x > 0, x = 8.
